coverage_features.name: On-Water Towing
coverage_features.description: Covers the cost of towing your boat to the nearest repair facility or safe harbor if it becomes disabled on the water.

coverage_features.name: Uninsured Boater Coverage
coverage_features.description: Provides coverage if you are injured or your boat is damaged by a boater who has no insurance or insufficient insurance.

coverage_features.name: Personal Effects Coverage
coverage_features.description: Helps replace personal items on board such as fishing gear, electronics, and life jackets if they are stolen or damaged.

coverage_features.name: Medical Payments
coverage_features.description: Pays for reasonable medical expenses for you and your passengers due to a covered boating accident, regardless of fault.

coverage_features.name: Hull & Structural Damage
coverage_features.description: Covers physical damage to the hull, mast, sails, and attached equipment caused by covered perils such as collision or storms.

coverage_features.name: Liability Coverage
coverage_features.description: Provides protection if you are legally responsible for injuries or property damage to others while operating your boat.

discounts.name: Boating Safety Course Discount
discounts.shortDescription: Save when you complete an approved boating safety course.
discounts.eligibilityDescription: Available to primary operators who have successfully completed a state-approved or NASBLA-certified boating safety course within the last 5 years. Proof of completion may be required.

discounts.name: Multi-Policy Discount
discounts.shortDescription: Bundle boat insurance with home, renters, or auto and save.
discounts.eligibilityDescription: Applies when you have an active homeowners, condo, renters, or auto insurance policy with our company in addition to your boat policy. All policies must be in the same household.

discounts.name: Claims-Free Discount
discounts.shortDescription: Reward for maintaining a claims-free boating record.
discounts.eligibilityDescription: Eligible after 3 consecutive years with no at-fault claims or major violations on any insured watercraft.

discounts.name: Early Quote Discount
discounts.shortDescription: Save when you shop at least 7 days before coverage starts.
discounts.eligibilityDescription: Available when your quote start date is at least 7 days prior to the effective date of your new boat policy.

discounts.name: Paid in Full Discount
discounts.shortDescription: Get a discount for paying your policy premium in full.
discounts.eligibilityDescription: Applies when you choose the annual billing option and pay the full premium amount by the policy effective date.

help_articles.title: About Our Boat Insurance Company
help_articles.content:
We are a Pacific Northwest–based insurer specializing in boat and marine coverage for local lakes, rivers, and coastal waters. Our dedicated team of licensed agents understands the unique risks of boating around Seattle, including Lake Union, Puget Sound, and surrounding waterways.

We offer a range of coverage options from basic liability-only policies to comprehensive hull coverage with optional towing, personal effects, and more. Our online tools make it easy to get a quote, manage your policy, and file a claim 24/7.

If you prefer personal guidance, our local agent network can help you compare policy types, apply discounts such as Boating Safety Course or Multi-Policy, and tailor protection to your specific boat and usage.

help_articles.title: Contact Us
help_articles.content:
Need help with a quote, claim, or existing boat policy? You can reach our customer care team in several ways:

• Phone: 1-800-555-0199 (Mon–Fri, 8 a.m.–6 p.m. PT)
• Email: support@exampleboatins.com (responses within 1 business day)
• Mail: Example Boat Insurance, PO Box 12345, Seattle, WA 98101

For fast service on an existing policy, have your policy number ready. For online claims and quote questions, you can also use the Help & FAQs section or send a secure message from the My Policy dashboard after signing in.

help_articles.title: Privacy Policy
help_articles.content:
This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website, request a quote, purchase a policy, or file a claim.

We collect information you provide directly (such as your name, address, and details about your boat) and information collected automatically (such as device and usage data). We use this information to provide insurance quotes, service your policies, comply with legal obligations, and improve our services.

We do not sell your personal information. We may share it with service providers, reinsurers, or regulators as permitted or required by law. You can learn more about your privacy choices and how to contact us with questions in this full policy document.

help_articles.title: Website Terms of Use
help_articles.content:
By accessing or using this website, you agree to these Terms of Use. The information and tools provided here are for general informational purposes and to help you obtain and manage insurance coverage.

Online quotes are estimates based on the information you provide and are not binding offers of insurance. Coverage is subject to underwriting approval, applicable policy terms, and state-specific requirements.

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. Misuse of the site, including providing false information to obtain coverage, may result in denial of coverage or cancellation of policies.

help_articles.title: Boat Eligibility for Online Quotes
help_articles.content:
Our online quote tool is designed for most pleasure-use boats kept and operated in our service area. To be eligible for an instant online quote, your boat must meet all of the following conditions:

1. Primary use is pleasure / personal use only (no full-time commercial or charter operations).
2. The boat is stored and primarily operated within approved waters in our coverage territory.
3. The maximum boat length for online quotes is 30 feet. Boats longer than 30 feet may still be eligible, but require assistance from a licensed agent and a custom quote.
4. The maximum boat value for online quotes is typically $250,000, subject to underwriting.

If your boat does not meet these criteria, please contact a local agent for a tailored quote. For example, if your boat is 28 or 29 feet long, you can proceed fully online. If your boat is 31 feet long, you will be guided to contact an agent instead of completing the quote online.

help_articles.title: FAQ: What is the Maximum Boat Length for Online Quotes?
help_articles.content:
You can use our website to get an instant quote for most small and mid-sized boats. The key limit to keep in mind is length.

The maximum boat length eligible for our online quote system is 30 feet measured overall (including swim platforms and bow pulpits). If your boat is 30 feet or shorter, you can typically complete the quote and purchase process entirely online.

If your boat is longer than 30 feet, the system will direct you to contact a local marine specialist so we can review your boat’s details, navigation area, and coverage needs before providing a binding quote.

optional_coverages.name: Towing & Assistance
optional_coverages.description: Provides reimbursement for on-water towing, jump starts, fuel delivery, and soft ungrounding when your boat becomes disabled on the water.

optional_coverages.name: Personal Effects Coverage
optional_coverages.description: Covers personal belongings such as fishing gear, coolers, electronics, and safety equipment while on board or being loaded or unloaded from your boat.

optional_coverages.name: Boat Trailer Coverage
optional_coverages.description: Adds physical damage coverage for your boat trailer when it is damaged by a covered cause such as collision, theft, or vandalism.

optional_coverages.name: Rental Reimbursement
optional_coverages.description: Helps pay for a temporary rental boat while your insured boat is out of service due to a covered loss.

optional_coverages.name: Additional Medical Payments
optional_coverages.description: Increases the per-person medical payments limit beyond what is included in your base policy.

policy_types.name: Liability Only
policy_types.description: Affordable protection focused on bodily injury and property damage you may cause to others while operating your boat.

policy_types.name: Standard
policy_types.description: Balanced coverage that includes liability, hull damage, uninsured boater coverage, and on-water towing for most recreational boaters.

policy_types.name: Premium
policy_types.description: Enhanced protection with higher liability limits, broader hull coverage, and extra benefits for frequent boaters and larger vessels.

insurance_plans.name: Liability Value 300 / 1000
insurance_plans.description: Entry-level liability-only plan with $300,000 liability and a $1,000 deductible for budget-conscious boaters.

insurance_plans.name: Standard Value 300 / 1000
insurance_plans.description: Balanced protection with hull coverage, towing, and $300,000 liability with a $1,000 deductible.

insurance_plans.name: Premium Value 300 / 1000
insurance_plans.description: Premium plan with enhanced hull protection and included towing and personal effects coverage.

insurance_plans.name: Liability Plus 300 / 500
insurance_plans.description: Liability-only coverage with a lower $500 deductible and $300,000 liability limit.

insurance_plans.name: Standard Balanced 300 / 500
insurance_plans.description: Popular choice combining $300,000 liability, hull coverage, on-water towing, and a $500 deductible.

insurance_plans.name: Premium Balanced 300 / 500
insurance_plans.description: Premium protection with $300,000 liability, $500 deductible, and built-in towing and personal effects coverage.

insurance_plans.name: Standard Secure 500 / 500
insurance_plans.description: Standard plan with increased $500,000 liability limit and a $500 deductible, including on-water towing.

insurance_plans.name: Premium Secure 500 / 500
insurance_plans.description: High-limit premium plan with $500,000 liability, hull coverage, towing, and expanded medical and personal effects protection.

insurance_plans.name: Liability Max 500 / 1000
insurance_plans.description: Higher-liability option for boaters who want $500,000 of liability protection with a $1,000 deductible.

insurance_plans.name: Standard High 1M / 1000
insurance_plans.description: Standard policy with $1,000,000 liability limit and a $1,000 deductible for added peace of mind.

insurance_plans.name: Premium Elite 1M / 500
insurance_plans.description: Top-tier plan with $1,000,000 liability, a low $500 deductible, and a full suite of included optional coverages.
